Gallery

Off The Grid All Stars

Animation Direction, Motion Design

Proving Grounds

Designing a modern motion identity for a classic esports community tournament series.

Porsche 911 Turbo Invitational

Debuting a high-octane tournament experience for Porsche and Rocket League.

Fortnite Reunion

Helping Epic Games celebrate Fortnite's return to form with a legendary tournament, featuring an oh-so-sweet tribute to the map that started it all.

Midnight Society

Directing a series of features around the upcoming game release Deadrop.

Tfue Tuesday

Unveiling an elite tournament franchise for one of Fortnite's biggest influencers.

Minecraft: Skyblock Showdown

Designing a trailer full of mystery and intrigue for Verizon's Minecraft tournament, with high quality cinematics captured on a custom in-game map.

BoomTV Wrapped 2023

Celebrating a year of outstanding events crafted by the incomparable creative team at BoomTV.

Mountain Dew CS2 Showdown

Assembling the ultimate PC for Mountain Dew's big Counter-Strike showdown.

Mountain Dew Champions Cup

A skyscraper sized announcement for a monumental gaming brand.
×

Footer

Let's Connect!

If you’re interested in collaborating, please fill out this quick form to help me get the big picture of your project. Don't skimp on details - the more specific you can be, the better!

I prioritize projects that feel like a great fit, but as long as you have a serious inquiry I will get back to you. I'm especially enthusiastic about collaborating on projects that prioritize social impact and humanitarian efforts. If your work aims to promote equality and tackle social issues, I would love to connect and explore how we can work together.

I enjoy having my creative capabilities challenged. If you don't see an exact example of what you're looking for within my portfolio, don't let that dissuade you. Research and development are my forte, and I have a knack for finding creative solutions to problems. If you'd like to just send me a friendly message, shoot me an email!

Spill The Tea...
